news_items.headline: Sources: MLB in LA28 facing hurdles with MLBPA
news_items.summary: Though support is growing for MLB to participate in the Olympics in 2028, it's complicated by disagreements with the MLBPA, according to sources.

news_items.headline: Walker hopes Derby win stirs Black kids to play
news_items.summary: Cardinals outfielder Jordan Walker wants to be a role model, and he hopes his victory in the Home Run Derby inspires more Black kids to play baseball.

news_items.headline: MLBPA rips salary cap ad campaign as 'perverse'
news_items.summary: MLBPA head Bruce Meyer chastised MLB management for its advertising campaign in support of a salary cap, saying their claims of economic woe are "perverse."

news_items.headline: Walker walks it off: Cards slugger wins HR Derby
news_items.summary: Jordan Walker homered on his last six swings to beat hometown favorite Kyle Schwarber, becoming the first Cardinal to win the Home Run Derby.

news_items.headline: Ohtani rookie card sells for a record $3.365M
news_items.summary: A 1-of-1 rookie card of MLB star Shohei Ohtani has sold privately for a record $3.365 million.

news_items.headline: Harper denies giving FanDuel consent for fan video...
news_items.summary: Phillies star Bryce Harper said Monday that he did not know how FanDuel would use a personalized video he made for a customer, who has since accused the sportsbook in a lawsuit of taking advantage of his gambling addiction.

news_items.headline: Schwarber to lead off for NL; 3 new AL starters
news_items.summary: The Phillies' Kyle Schwarber will lead off for the NL in the All-Star Game as the replacement for Shohei Ohtani, while Riley Greene, Ben Rice and Cody Bellinger will start for the AL.

news_items.headline: Poll Time: Which Jays Batter Will Improve The Most In The Second Half?
news_items.summary: I thought I’d ask the question, Who do you think will improve the most the second half of the season? I planned on have all the Jays regulars in the poll, but I’m limited to six option in the poll. Oh well. There is room for any of our hitters to improve, but let’s go […]

news_items.headline: Top-5 Red Sox All-Star Game moments… post-1999
news_items.summary: When your franchise is decades older than the very first iteration of your sport’s all-star event, you’re bound to have some iconic players making some key plays during the league’s premier mid-year showcase. The Boston Red Sox are no exception to that. Over 125 seasons and……….well, a lot of All-Stars later (I ain’t counting all […]

news_items.headline: Rangers Reacts Survey: Grade the Rangers 2026 Draft
news_items.summary: Welcome to SB Nation Reacts, a survey of fans across MLB. Throughout the year we ask questions of the most plugged-in Rangers fans and fans across the country. Sign up here to participate in the weekly emailed surveys. The 2026 MLB Draft took place over the weekend, with the Texas Rangers’ selections highlighted by prep […]

news_items.headline: Jordan Walker may have won Home Run Derby, but his parents stole the show
news_items.summary: The parents of St. Louis Cardinals slugger Jordan Walker were beaming with pride as he won the Home Run Derby, making them the night's biggest stars.
